message:
fix(codegen): Fail fast on collection/dict operations and unittest failures

Fixed silent failures in generated code:

Collections:
- enumerate() - final map() fallback now panics on OOM
- list.append() - panics on OOM in defer blocks (was silently dropping items)
- del list[start:end] - panics on OOM (replaceRange failure)
- Dynamic attribute assignment - panics on OOM in defer blocks

Unittest:
- setUp() failures now fail the test instead of being ignored
- tearDown() failures now fail the test instead of being ignored
- addFail() now panics on OOM instead of silently failing

IO:
- print() now propagates errors instead of swallowing them

Files:
- src/codegen/native/builtins/collections.zig
- src/codegen/native/builtins/io.zig
- src/codegen/native/methods/list.zig
- src/codegen/native/statements/misc.zig
- src/codegen/native/statements/assign/value_generation.zig
- src/codegen/native/unittest/lifecycle.zig

All changed from `catch {}` to `catch unreachable` or proper error handling.
